data.title: Update SC3 to reflect grep-based centrality when sg absent
data.description:
## Description
The epic SC3 states: "When sg is not installed, centrality defaults to 0 with a one-line stderr warning."
The actual implementation (by design) uses grep-based fan-in counting when sg is absent — centrality is computed, not defaulted to 0.

The grep-based approach was a deliberate design choice (see count_centrality() comments at line 183-188). Update the epic description to match the implementation.

## Fix
Update the epic comment with corrected SC3 text: "When sg is not installed, a one-line stderr note is emitted and centrality scoring uses grep-based fan-in counting. All existing test gate behavior is unchanged."

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Epic 1a5b-35f9 comment updated with corrected SC3
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 1a5b-35f9 | grep -q 'grep-based fan-in counting'
